kept.text:
🌊 $RKLB (Algo Flow) - Selling still dominant

Price spiked to $78.50 at the right edge. Flow didn't move.

Three days of flow below zero, grinding steadily lower to -2.0M with no real attempt at recovery. The right-edge price bounce looks sharp on the chart but the options tape sat at its lows while it happened, meaning flow has not confirmed this move. 

Until the tape starts climbing, that bounce is just noise inside a bearish regime.

Bulls watch: flow stops making new lows and starts building higher lows above -2.0M. Price needs to hold above $79 for this to mean anything.

profile_bio.description: I enjoy drinking good wine as much as I do trading stocks; they also happen to both cost me money.

quoted_tweet.text:
🔥 $RKLB Flow Heatmap

$2.29M in $75 calls for June with the $90 strike green across every expiry from May through October. The near-term accumulation is right at current levels and the mid-term conviction is stacking consistently above it.

Then at the far end, $135 calls for October appeared for the first time. That is 69% above current price with real size behind it. $100 puts for July define the ceiling where the trade gets harder before the extension.

Last week the campaign was targeting $90. This week someone extended the range all the way to $135 by fall.
